pet_notes: A compact creepy digital pet mascot: a dark segmented centipede-like crawler with tiny stub legs, several pale porcelain mask faces embedded into its body segments, glassy teal eyes, stitched-looking surface seams as painted shell markings only, no wounds, no blood, no exposed anatomy, no restraints, no joined humans, no medical horror, no gore. Keep it eerie, pixelly, and unsettling while clearly fictional and chibi.
style_notes: Professional polished pixel-art-adjacent Codex pet: thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped pixel edges, compact readable 192x208 silhouette, charcoal segmented shell, bone-white mask faces, muted teal eye glow, flat cel shading, crisp hard-edged highlights, no shadows, no gradients, clean pure magenta chroma-key background. Improve animation quality and frame-to-frame motion while preserving the creepy pixel style.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
